description: Prudential investment-limit compliance monitoring for SA retirement funds under Pension Funds Act Regulation 28.

validation.message: Fund ID must match FSCA registration format.

fields.name: total_fund_value
fields.label: Total Fair Value of Fund Assets (ZAR)

validation.message: Total fund value cannot be negative.

regulatory: MUST: Apply asset-class fair-value caps measured after look-through into collective investment schemes, pooled vehicles, and linked-policy wrappers.
MUST: Cap equity exposure at 75% of total fund value (listed + unlisted combined).
MUST: Cap immovable property exposure at 25% of total fund value.
MUST: Cap foreign (offshore) asset exposure at 45% of total fund value, per National Treasury and FSCA direction.
MUST: Cap African assets outside South Africa at 10% of total fund value, included within the 45% offshore limit.
MUST: Cap hedge-fund exposure at 10% of total fund value.
MUST: Cap private-equity exposure at 15% of total fund value.
MUST: Cap commodities (including gold) at 10% of total fund value.
MUST: Prohibit direct investment in crypto assets (0% cap) per FSCA guidance under Regulation 28.
MUST: Enforce issuer concentration limits — max 5% per unlisted issuer, 10% per listed non-SOE issuer, 15% for SOE issuers, 25% for South African government debt per instrument category.
MUST: Enforce bank-deposit limits — max 25% per top-four bank, 10% per other bank, per deposit-taking counterparty.
MUST: Review the Investment Policy Statement at least annually and document how Reg 28 compliance is monitored.
MUST: Document sustainability (ESG) considerations in every material investment decision per reg 28(2)(c)(ix).
MUST: Report breaches to the FSCA and the fund's board of trustees per FSCA-prescribed template and timeline.
SHOULD: Distinguish active from passive breaches — remediation urgency differs.
SHOULD: Apply the prudent person principle — investments must be liquid enough to meet benefit obligations.
SHOULD: Monitor compliance continuously; do not rely on quarter-end snapshots alone.
MAY: Apply stricter internal limits than Reg 28 minimums where trustees deem prudent.
security: MUST: Restrict write access to holdings data to authorised fund administrators and principal officers only.
MUST: Log every limit calculation, breach determination, and FSCA submission to an immutable audit trail.
MUST: Treat member-level information as personal information under POPIA — regulatory returns are fund-level only, never per-member.
MUST: Encrypt holdings and valuation data at rest and in transit (TLS 1.2+ minimum).
SHOULD: Require dual-control (maker-checker) for breach remediation approvals and FSCA submissions.
SHOULD: Sign FSCA submissions with the fund's digital certificate.
data_integrity: MUST: Reject holdings snapshots whose constituent fair values do not reconcile to total_fund_value within 0.01% tolerance.
MUST: Apply look-through valuation to all pooled vehicles — no opaque CIS allocation may count toward limit calculation.
MUST: Use fair value (IFRS 13) — reject cost-basis valuations for Reg 28 reporting.
SHOULD: Version every holdings snapshot so historical compliance can be re-computed.

compliant_snapshot.description: Fund satisfies all Reg 28 caps for the reporting date; recorded for audit.
given: all asset-class exposures are within prescribed caps after look-through
all issuer concentration limits are within prescribed caps
holdings fair values reconcile to total_fund_value
ESG assessment is present and non-empty
compliant_snapshot.result: Fund is Reg 28 compliant for the reporting date; snapshot recorded to audit trail.

active_breach_detected.description: Fund-initiated breach of a prudential limit — highest remediation urgency.
active_breach_detected.result: Active breach flagged; remediation plan required within FSCA-prescribed timeline.

passive_breach_detected.description: Market-driven breach — remediation allowed within reasonable period.
passive_breach_detected.result: Passive breach logged; remediation plan must bring exposure within cap within a reasonable period.

issuer_concentration_breach.result: Issuer/counterparty limit exceeded; concentration risk flagged for remediation.

reconciliation_failure.description: Rejects snapshots whose fair values do not reconcile to total fund value.
reconciliation_failure.result: Snapshot rejected; correct holdings data before re-running compliance.

look_through_unavailable.description: Opaque pooled vehicles prevent accurate limit computation.
look_through_unavailable.result: Look-through data missing; compliance cannot be computed until resolved.

quarterly_report_filed.description: Form 28 filed with FSCA for the quarter.
given: compliance snapshot is in compliant or remediated state
quarterly_report_filed.result: Form 28 filed with FSCA; submission reference captured for audit.

remediation_plan_approved.description: Board has approved a breach remediation plan; execution tracked to closure.
given: a breach is in open state
remediation plan has been tabled to the board of trustees
remediation_plan_approved.result: Remediation plan recorded; execution tracked until breach resolved.

actors.name: Principal Officer
actors.description: Accountable for fund operations and regulatory compliance under s.8 of the Pension Funds Act.

actors.name: Board of Trustees
actors.description: Fiduciary oversight; approves IPS, breach remediation, and ESG policy.

actors.name: Fund Administrator
actors.description: Maintains holdings data, runs daily compliance checks, prepares returns.

actors.name: Investment Manager
actors.description: Manages assets within mandate; must operate within Reg 28 limits.

actors.name: Financial Sector Conduct Authority
actors.description: Regulator; receives Form 28 submissions and breach notifications.

actors.name: Reg 28 Compliance Engine
actors.description: Computes limits, detects breaches, generates audit logs and returns.

values.description: Fund-initiated breach of a prescribed cap.
Market-driven breach of a prescribed cap.
Issuer or counterparty concentration limit exceeded.
Breach acknowledged, plan approved, execution under way.
Exposures brought back within caps; breach closed.

transitions.condition: exposures back within caps for two consecutive valuation dates

active_breach_notification.escalation: principal_officer notifies FSCA within FSCA-prescribed window
active_breach_notification.description: Active breaches must be communicated to the board and FSCA promptly.

quarterly_report_submission.description: Form 28 must be submitted within the FSCA-prescribed period after quarter-end.

breach_remediation.escalation: prolonged breach escalated to FSCA for directive
breach_remediation.description: Breaches should be remediated within a reasonable period.

daily_compliance_check.description: Daily look-through compliance computation for a fund.
steps: Ingest latest holdings from administration and asset-manager feeds.
Apply look-through to all CIS, pooled, and wrapper vehicles.
Reconcile holdings fair values to total fund value.
Compute asset-class exposures and compare to caps.
Compute issuer/counterparty concentrations and compare to caps.
Classify any breach as active or passive.
Emit events and persist compliance snapshot.
Notify principal officer of any breach.

quarterly_fsca_return.description: Prepare and submit Form 28 to the FSCA.
steps: Reviewer (maker-checker) verifies caps, concentrations, and ESG narrative.
Principal officer digitally signs the return.
Submit to FSCA via the prescribed electronic channel.
Capture submission reference in the audit log.
Fund administrator prepares remediation plan with target dates and rebalancing actions.
Investment committee reviews and recommends to the board.
Board approves the plan and records minutes.
Investment manager executes rebalancing within approved mandate.
Compliance engine re-runs checks daily until two consecutive compliant snapshots.

errors.message: The fund has breached a Regulation 28 prudential limit. Remediation required.
A Regulation 28 limit has been exceeded due to market movement. Remediation plan required.
Issuer or counterparty concentration limit exceeded.
Holdings do not reconcile to total fund value; snapshot rejected.
Look-through data missing for one or more pooled vehicles.
Caller is not authorised to submit or view Reg 28 data for this fund.
FSCA submission service is unavailable; please retry.

events.name: reg28.snapshot_compliant
events.description: A valuation snapshot satisfies all limits.

events.name: reg28.snapshot_rejected
events.description: A snapshot failed reconciliation or look-through.

events.name: reg28.breach_concentration
events.description: An issuer/counterparty concentration limit was exceeded.

events.name: reg28.lookthrough_missing
events.description: Look-through data missing for one or more pooled vehicles.

events.name: reg28.report_filed
events.description: Quarterly Form 28 was submitted to FSCA.

events.name: reg28.remediation_approved
events.description: Board approved a breach remediation plan.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not compute limits on top-level CIS allocations without look-through.
anti_patterns.why: A balanced CIS may contain >75% equity; ignoring look-through hides real equity exposure and produces false-positive compliance.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not treat passive breaches as non-events.
anti_patterns.why: Reg 28 requires a remediation plan for passive breaches within a reasonable period, not indefinite tolerance.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not hard-code the 45% offshore cap as 30%.
anti_patterns.why: National Treasury raised the cap in 2022; stale thresholds produce false breaches and wasted remediation effort.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not classify crypto assets under 'other' to bypass the 0% cap.
anti_patterns.why: FSCA guidance treats crypto as prohibited under Reg 28; misclassification is a reportable governance failure.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not expose member-level PII in FSCA returns.
anti_patterns.why: Form 28 is a fund-level return; member data inclusion breaches POPIA and the purpose-specification principle.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not rely on month-end snapshots alone.
anti_patterns.why: Prudent-person duty requires continuous monitoring; intra-month trustee-action breaches are still active breaches.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not let the investment manager self-certify compliance without independent reconciliation.
anti_patterns.why: Maker-checker separation is required for regulatory returns; self-certification invalidates the audit trail.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not omit the ESG / sustainability narrative from the IPS and snapshots.
anti_patterns.why: Reg 28(2)(c)(ix) mandates sustainability consideration; absence is itself a compliance failure.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not use cost basis instead of fair value for limit calculations.
anti_patterns.why: Reg 28 measures exposures on fair value (IFRS 13); cost basis understates risk and misstates compliance.

anti_patterns.rule: Do not treat SOE debt as sovereign debt for concentration limits.
anti_patterns.why: SOE issuer cap (15%) is distinct from government debt cap (25% per instrument category); conflating the two breaches concentration rules.

related.reason: Member and beneficiary data processed by the fund is personal information under POPIA.
Portfolio valuation data feeds the Reg 28 compliance engine.
Fair-value pricing for fixed-income instruments used in limit calculations.
Audit logs and compliance snapshots have statutory retention requirements.
Storage of IPS, board minutes, remediation plans, and FSCA submission proofs.

primary_views: Compliance dashboard showing asset-class caps as bar charts with current exposure vs limit.
Issuer concentration heatmap highlighting counterparties near or above caps.
Breach register with status, age, and remediation progress.
Quarterly return preview with maker-checker sign-off panel.
accessibility: All charts must have tabular fallback views for screen-reader users.
Colour-blind-safe palette for cap-status indicators (do not rely on red/green alone).

goals.description: Continuously ensure the fund's portfolio satisfies Regulation 28 prudential limits.

success_metrics.measurement: Count of active breaches discovered outside the compliance engine per quarter.
Percentage of quarterly Form 28 filings submitted before FSCA deadline.
Hours between market-movement breach and engine flag.

constraints.description: All determinations must comply with Pension Funds Act s.36 and Reg 28 as amended.
Member personal information must never leave POPIA-compliant processing boundary.

human_checkpoints: Board approval of the Investment Policy Statement and any material change thereto.
Board approval of every breach remediation plan.
Principal officer sign-off on every Form 28 submission.
Trustee review of the ESG / sustainability narrative at least annually.

exposes.contract: Accepts a holdings snapshot; returns compliance_status and breach list.
Accepts a locked snapshot; returns FSCA submission reference.
